---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One paragraph describing the feature and why it matters.

## Phase Tag

- [ ] `[MVP]` — core feature, needs to be built now
- [ ] `[PHASE_2]` — near-term planned feature
- [ ] `[ROADMAP]` — long-term research direction

## Problem It Solves

What gap does this address? Link to any relevant research paper or security advisory if applicable.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Include any API contract changes, UI changes, or database schema changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass

## Alternative Considered

What else was considered and why was it rejected?

## Impact on Existing Features

Does this change break or require updates to any existing component?

- [ ] Backend models
- [ ] API contract (breaking change)
- [ ] Database migration required
- [ ] Frontend types or components
- [ ] Seed data
- [ ] Demo verification checklist
